image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about antigen presentation.
Context visual: Antigen presentation is how our immune system identifies threats.
Escalation visual: Cells capture antigens, then display them on their surfaces.
Evidence visual: This interaction triggers T-cells, activating our immune response.
Payoff visual: Without this process, our bodies would struggle to recognize infections!
Cta visual: Curious about how this impacts vaccines? Hit like and follow for more!
